title: ClickUp vs Microsoft Teams
description: Compare ClickUp vs Microsoft Teams — a project management platform versus a communication solution. Find out which tool better suits your workflow.
verdict: ClickUp (Project Management) and Microsoft Teams (Communication) serve different primary purposes. ClickUp has a higher user rating, but the right choice depends on whether your priority is project management or communication capabilities.

faqs.question: What is the difference between ClickUp and Microsoft Teams?
faqs.answer: ClickUp is a project management tool, while Microsoft Teams is a communication platform. They serve different primary functions but may overlap in certain areas.

faqs.question: Can ClickUp replace Microsoft Teams?
faqs.answer: Not directly — they serve different categories. Some organizations use both for different purposes.

faqs.question: Which has better value, ClickUp or Microsoft Teams?
faqs.answer: ClickUp (Free–$19/user/mo) and Microsoft Teams (Free – $12.50/mo per user) have different pricing. Evaluate based on which category matters more for your workflows.
